/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/Velion_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/clickableslider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/playlistwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/mprisservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/playerwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/playbacknotificationmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/trackmetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/coverartmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/gstplayerbackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velion.dir/lyricsmanager.cpp.o -o Velion  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 -ltag -lz -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstaudio-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 -lgstaudio-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0
